design_intent: a responsive civic pavilion that blends public gathering, digital craft, and climate-aware urban design
geometry: fluid canopy, modular ribs, transparent envelope, stepped public plinth, integrated seating edges
site_context: dense Manchester city-centre setting with pedestrian movement, tram lines, historic brick context, and rainy climate
materials: brushed aluminium ribs, recycled glass, translucent ETFE, warm timber soffits, rain gardens, permeable stone paving
style: cinematic architectural realism with high-detail materials and restrained futuristic language
camera_angle: low wide-angle street view with a secondary aerial option
lighting: overcast Manchester daylight with soft reflections, wet paving, and warm interior glow
references: urban pavilion, parametric canopy, civic technology hub
